patches.snippet: Utils::Hook(0x403547, CL_Disconnect_Stub, HOOK_JUMP).install()->quick(); // CL_Disconnect but at the very end, whether we were connected or not
Utils::Hook::Nop(0x414E4D, 6);          // cl->messageAcknowledge > cl->gamestateMessageNum check in SV_ExecuteClientMessage
Utils::Hook::Set<BYTE>(0x41B9F0, 0xC3); // called from Com_Frame, seems to do renderer stuff
Utils::Hook::Set<BYTE>(0x41D010, 0xC3); // CL_CheckForResend, which tries to connect to the local server constantly
Utils::Hook(0x4611CA, ClientConnectFailedStub, HOOK_CALL).install()->quick(); // NET_OutOfBandPrint (Grab IP super easy)
Utils::Hook::Set<BYTE>(0x468960, 0xC3); // some mixer-related function called on shutdown
Utils::Hook::Set<std::uint8_t>(0x49C220, 0xC3); // We wanted to send a logging packet, but we haven't connected to LSP!
Utils::Hook::Set<BYTE>(0x4B0FC3, 0x04); // make CL_Frame do client packets, even for game state 9
Utils::Hook::Nop(0x4CDEEC, 5); // Don't reset the netsource when gametypes aren't loaded
Utils::Hook(0x4CFF5C, PmoveSingle_Stub, HOOK_CALL).install()->quick(); 			// single PmoveSingle call inside Pmove
Utils::Hook::Nop(0x4DCEC9, 2);          // some check preventing proper game functioning
Utils::Hook(0x573FEF, PM_LadderMove_PitchStub, HOOK_JUMP).install()->quick();       // pitch-scaled climb rate block
Utils::Hook(0x574061, PM_LadderMove_RightVector_Hk, HOOK_CALL).install()->quick();  // camera-relative right-vector projection
Utils::Hook(0x574AF4, PM_CheckLadderMove_Stub, HOOK_CALL).install()->quick(); 	// single PM_CheckLadderMove call inside PmoveSingle
Utils::Hook::Nop(0x59A896, 5);          // warning message on a removed subsystem
//		Utils::Hook::Nop(0x60BEB1, 5); // GamerProfile_InitAllProfiles - Causes an error, when calling a harrier killstreak.
Utils::Hook::Nop(0x60BEF6, 5); // Don't reset the intro dvar
Utils::Hook::Set<BYTE>(0x62B6C0, 0xC3); // UI expression 'DebugPrint', mainly to prevent some console spam
Utils::Hook::Nop(0x64CF77, 5);          // function detecting video card, causes Direct3DCreate9 to be called
Utils::Hook::Set<std::uint8_t>(0x682170, 0xC3); // Telling LSP that we're playing a private match
Utils::Hook::Set<BYTE>(0x683370, 0xC3); // steam sometimes doesn't like the server
